summary: Add SETTLEMENT_DATE to FCT_TRADES and expose it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS
description: Business wants settlement reporting. Add a new SETTLEMENT_DATE column to FCT_TRADES (T+2 from trade date), populate it in LOAD_FCT_TRADES, and surface settlement date in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS so downstream consumers can report on a settlement basis. This is new functionality, not a defect.

triage.rationale: Ticket type is Story with label 'enhancement'; description explicitly states 'new functionality, not a defect' — adds a new SETTLEMENT_DATE column to FCT_TRADES, populates it in LOAD_FCT_TRADES, and surfaces it in VW_DAILY_POSITIONS; purely additive scope with no existing behavior broken.

impacted_objects.name: FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Named in summary and components; requires a new SETTLEMENT_DATE column (DATE or NUMBER FK to DIM_DATE for T+2 from TRADE_DATE)

impacted_objects.name: LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Nightly loader for FCT_TRADES; INSERT column list and SELECT projection must be extended to derive and populate SETTLEMENT_DATE (TRADE_DATE + 2 trading days via DIM_DATE or DATEADD)

impacted_objects.name: VW_DAILY_POSITIONS
impacted_objects.why: Named in summary and components; currently reads FCT_TRADES and joins DIM_DATE on TRADE_DATE_KEY — must be updated to expose SETTLEMENT_DATE so downstream consumers can group/filter on a settlement basis

impacted_objects.name: DIM_DATE
impacted_objects.why: Contains IS_TRADING_DAY flag; LOAD_FCT_TRADES will need to resolve T+2 settlement date using DIM_DATE calendar data (second join or subquery to skip non-trading days)

impacted_objects.name: CTM_LOAD_FCT_TRADES
impacted_objects.why: Calls LOAD_FCT_TRADES nightly; no schedule change expected, but job definition and its impacted_objects list must be reviewed/updated to include SETTLEMENT_DATE context after proc changes land
